---
title: "FINALEXAM123PART5"
format: docx
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
```

```{r}
#a) # of rows:
diamonds |> count()
#b) 
diamonds |> group_by(cut) |> summarize(avg_table = mean(table))
#c)
diamonds |> filter(clarity == "IF")
#d)
diamonds |> arrange(desc(price))
#e)
diamonds |> mutate(Carat.Price.Ratio = price/carat, .after = depth)
#f)
diamonds |> tail(3)
```
